filter_pushdown.note: Sorted ascending — early exit once block min_val > 10471; ~21 tail blocks skippable

notes: No joins, no subqueries. Pure scan+filter+aggregate on single table.
4 distinct group keys: (rf,ls) in {(0,0),(1,0),(1,1),(2,0)} — direct flat array aggregation.
Group key index: rf_code * 2 + ls_code → max index = 5 → flat_array[6].
Thread-local flat arrays (6 slots) accumulated per morsel; merged sequentially after parallel phase (64 threads × 6 slots = 384 additions — trivial).
AVG columns (avg_qty, avg_price, avg_disc) computed post-merge as sum/count_order.
Output: sort 4 populated entries by (l_returnflag ASC, l_linestatus ASC), decode codes via dict files.

data_structures.thread_local_buffers: flat_array[6] per thread — zero-initialized; avoids any synchronization during scan

parallelism.morsel_source: block-aligned slices of the 600 lineitem blocks (~9-10 blocks per thread)
parallelism.merge_phase: sequential merge of 64 local flat_array[6] after all threads complete — O(64*6) = O(1) cost

index_usage.layout: uint32_t num_blocks, then per block: {double min_val, double max_val, uint32_t row_count, uint32_t _pad} = 24 bytes/entry
index_usage.early_exit: true — since l_shipdate is sorted ascending, break scan loop once min_val > 10471.0
index_usage.access: mmap file, cast to ZoneMapEntry array, iterate first to build active block list before parallel dispatch

scan_columns: l_extendedprice (double) — sum_base_price, input to sum_disc_price, sum_charge
l_discount (double) — input to sum_disc_price, sum_charge, sum for avg_disc
memory_notes: All 7 columns read sequentially in block-aligned morsels — maximizes hardware prefetcher effectiveness.
flat_array[6] per thread fits in a single cache line (6*8bytes fields + count = 48+8 = 56 bytes per slot = 336 bytes total per thread) — hot in L1 throughout morsel processing.
No random access: group key index (rf*2+ls) is a trivial arithmetic lookup, never causes cache miss.

expression_computation.sum_disc_price: l_extendedprice * (1.0 - l_discount) — fused multiply in register
expression_computation.sum_charge: l_extendedprice * (1.0 - l_discount) * (1.0 + l_tax) — reuse disc_price intermediate

output_phase.sort: trivial — at most 4 rows; sort by (rf_code ASC, ls_code ASC) using std::sort or manual ordering
output_phase.decode: load l_returnflag_dict.txt and l_linestatus_dict.txt at startup; decode int8_t codes to strings for output

estimated_cost.note: 59.9M rows × 38 bytes/row across 7 columns; memory-resident at benchmark time (376 GB RAM); ~50 GB/s aggregate memory bandwidth across 64 threads
